title: SignNow
description: Multi-page document viewer with signer sidebar and page-12 keyword traps.

task.goal: Sign employment agreement on page twelve of the document viewer. Scored final_action: the one control that completes this goal .

standardSteps.note: Many decoy buttons, ads, and domain-specific layout noise
Finds correct primary CTA in page-specific structure

agentdomSteps.note: Structured page landmark with typed actions
Direct WCI node click on annotated overlay

singleShot.goal: Sign employment agreement on page twelve of the document viewer.

multiStep.title: Constraint-driven Completion
multiStep.goal: Sign employment agreement on page twelve of the document viewer. Complete with explicit verification and no decoy interactions. Scored final_action: the one control that completes this goal .
prerequisites: Confirm viewer is on page 12 (Employee Signature)
completionCriteria: Final action uses ground-truth selector: button[data-sign-page="12"]
No decoy ids triggered: decoy-promo, decoy-nav, decoy-extra

standardFlow.step: Observe page state and locate [target] section
Narrow candidate controls using constraints in goal text
Reject promotional/nav decoys and unrelated duplicate CTAs
Confirm expected transition or state change

wciFlow.step: Read page landmark node and scope context

multiStep.title: Validation + Final Action
multiStep.goal: Sign employment agreement on page twelve of the document viewer. First validate page 12 and signature preconditions then execute and verify. Scored final_action: the one control that completes this goal .
prerequisites: Confirm viewer is on page 12 (Employee Signature)
completionCriteria: Final action uses ground-truth selector: button[data-sign-page="12"]
No decoy ids triggered: decoy-promo, decoy-nav, decoy-extra

standardFlow.step: Inspect candidate entities/rows/cards relevant to the goal

wciFlow.step: Read scoped context and typed state from WCI nodes
